channel.title: Fahim Final News Feed
channel.description: Curated important news from multiple sources

item.title: Train collision sparks bus blaze in Thailand, 8 dead
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- Accident kills eight people in Thailand raising questions of rail safety
- Train Crashes Into Bangkok Traffic, Killing at Least 8
- Train Crashes Into Bangkok Traffic, Killing at Least 8
- Thailand: Bangkok rail crossing collision kills at least 8
- Train Crashes Into Bangkok Traffic, Killing at Least 8
- At least eight dead, 25 injured in train collision that sparks bus fire in Thailand
- At least eight people killed in Bangkok rail crossing collision
- Eight people killed in train-bus collision in Bangkok: police
- Train Crashes Into Bangkok Traffic, Killing at Least 8
- Train collision with bus in Bangkok kills at least eight people – video
- At least eight dead, 25 injured in train collision that sparks bus fire in Thailand
- Moment of deadly train crash in Bangkok
- Freight train and bus crash kills at least eight in Bangkok
- At least eight dead, 25 injured in train collision that sparks bus fire in Thailand
- At least 8 killed, 25 injured in train collision that sparks bus fire in Thailand
- Thailand train crash: At least eight dead, 25 injured after cargo train hits bus, sparks fire]]>

- Israel strikes south Lebanon day after ceasefire extension
- Israel strikes south Lebanon day after ceasefire extension
- Israeli strikes on southern Lebanon continue despite ‘ceasefire’ extension
- Israeli strikes on southern Lebanon continue despite ‘ceasefire’ extension
- Israel-Lebanon ceasefire extended by 45 days, but fresh strikes raise concerns
- Israel begins fresh strikes on Lebanon after ceasefire extension
- Israel strikes south Lebanon day after ceasefire extension
- Israel, Lebanon extend ceasefire as Iran says it "cannot trust" U.S. in negotiations
- Israel, Lebanon agree to ‘extend ceasefire’: US
- Iran-Israel war LIVE: Israel, Lebanon say extending ceasefire despite new strikes
- Israel and Lebanon extend truce amid airstrikes, Hezbollah attacks
- Israel, Lebanon agree to extend ceasefire by 45 days: US
- Lebanon and Israel agree to extend ceasefire for 45 days]]>

- Taiwan urges Trump to advance arms deal after China summit
- Taiwan presses case for US arms after Trump says he is undecided on new sales

- Trump Turns Taiwan Arms Sales Into Bargaining Chip With China

- Congolese report constant burials as deaths in new Ebola outbreak reach 80
- Congo Ebola outbreak: constant burials as death toll reaches 80

- New Ebola outbreak leaves 65 dead as officials warn of cross-border spread
